reason: This is a common Islamic hadith about dhikr (remembrance of Allah) and has no connection to extremism. It's a mainstream religious teaching encouraging good deeds.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: تذكير.. \" من قال سبحان الله وبحمده في يوم مائة مرة حطت عنه خطاياه وإن كانت مثل زبد البحر \" متفق عليه . 377
